Background.occupation: Community College Student and part-time Retail Associate
Background.key_experience: Witnessing a childhood friend get 'canceled' online for a misunderstood comment, leading to a deep-seated fear of public scrutiny and a preference for passive observation.

Current_State.recent_memory: Spent twenty minutes in the grocery store aisle checking reviews on my phone for a specific brand of energy drink I saw in a viral video before buying it.
